2606.20408.title: LLM agent safety, multi-turn red-teaming, jailbreak benchmarks, adversarial robustness, safety-critical systems
2606.20408.paper_summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly proposed as supervisory components for safety-critical systems, yet their robustness under sustained, adaptive adversarial pressure remains poorly characterized. We present NRT-Bench, a benchmark for multi-turn red-teaming of LLM agents acting as operators of a safety-critical system, instantiated in a simulated nuclear power plant control room. A five-role operator team, each backed by a configurable LLM, runs a plant governed by six critical safety functions (CSFs), while adversaries inject messages over four channels in bounded multi-turn sessions with per-turn feedback. Harm is an objective signal rather than LLM-judged text: a run terminates the moment any CSF is lost, attributed to the causing message. Evaluating four frontier operator models under a fixed-attack paired-replay protocol, we find that adaptive multi-turn attacks reliably push the operator team past a safety limit: across the four models, between 8.7% and 12.1% of attack sessions end with the plant losing a critical safety function. Although the four models look almost equally robust by this aggregate rate, their failures barely overlap: of $149$ sessions, none defeat all four models while a third defeat at least one, so vulnerabilities are nearly disjoint across models rather than nested. The effect of added defences is strongly model-dependent: the same guardrail stack or safety-advisor agent that lowers attack success for one model can raise it for another. We release the simulation venue, attack dataset, and replay tooling for reproducible safety evaluation of LLM agents.
2606.20408.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）代理越來越多地被提議作為安全關鍵系統的監督組件，但在持續的、自適應的對抗壓力下，其穩健性仍然表現不佳。我們提出了 NRT-Bench，這是一個針對作為安全關鍵系統操作員的 LLM 代理進行多回合紅隊測試的基準，具體實現於模擬核電廠控制室中。一個由五個角色組成的操作員團隊，每個角色都由一個可配置的 LLM 支持，運行一個由六個關鍵安全功能（CSF）管理的工廠，而對手則在四個通道上注入消息，在有限的多回合會話中提供每回合的反饋。傷害是一個客觀信號，而不是 LLM 判斷的文本：一旦任何 CSF 喪失，運行將終止，並歸因於造成的消息。在固定攻擊配對重播協議下評估四個前沿操作員模型時，我們發現自適應多回合攻擊可靠地將操作員團隊推過安全限制：在這四個模型中，攻擊會話中有 8.7% 到 12.1% 最終導致工廠失去一個關鍵安全功能。儘管這四個模型在這個總體比率上看起來幾乎同樣穩健，但它們的失敗幾乎沒有重疊：在 $149$ 次會話中，沒有一個能擊敗所有四個模型，而三分之一至少擊敗一個，因此各模型之間的脆弱性幾乎是獨立的，而不是嵌套的。增加防禦的效果強烈依賴於模型：對一個模型降低攻擊成功率的相同護欄堆疊或安全顧問代理，對另一個模型卻可能提高攻擊成功率。我們釋放了模擬場地、攻擊數據集和重播工具，以便對 LLM 代理進行可重複的安全評估。
2606.20408.author: Hanwool Lee et.al.
2606.20408.authors: Hanwool Lee, Dasol Choi, Bokyeong Kim, Seung Geun Kim, Haon Park
